conversations.content: Today we studied the Mount Hyjal Guardian Line Emergency Resolution. If an infernal airdrop from the Demon Legion is discovered...
Infernal airdrop? The World Tree is in danger! How do you respond?
then activate the night elf rune traps, then awaken the treants to perform physical strangulation.
Rune traps plus treant strangulation — the power of nature! Any other threats?
If fel bombing by Doomguards is detected, then open the Emerald Dream sanctuary, then raise Elune's moon barrier.
Emerald Dream sanctuary plus moon barrier — double defense! What's the third scenario?
If the dark summoning circle of a Pit Lord is sensed, then release Cenarius's purification light, then interrupt the fel summoning ritual.
Purification light to interrupt the summoning — strike at the heart! When any of these happens, what must ultimately be done?
If any of the above situations occurs, then the World Tree horn must be sounded, summon all the Dragon Aspects for reinforcements, and activate Nordrassil's nature shield.

think: Mount Hyjal Guardian Line: three threats: infernal airdrop → night elf rune traps + treant strangulation; Doomguard fel bombing → Emerald Dream sanctuary + Elune's moon barrier; Pit Lord dark summoning circle → Cenarius's purification light + interrupt fel summoning. Any case → sound World Tree horn + summon all Dragon Aspects + activate Nordrassil nature shield.
memory: Mount Hyjal Guardian Line Emergency Resolution: If an infernal airdrop from the Demon Legion is discovered, then activate the night elf rune traps, then awaken the treants to perform physical strangulation; if fel bombing by Doomguards is detected, then open the Emerald Dream sanctuary, then raise Elune's moon barrier; if the dark summoning circle of a Pit Lord is sensed, then release Cenarius's purification light, then interrupt the fel summoning ritual; if any of the above situations occurs, then the World Tree horn must be sounded, summon all the Dragon Aspects for reinforcements, and activate Nordrassil's nature shield.
